eventPreCondition: Play if a Shadow Army contianing Nazgûl is adjacent to, or is in the same region as, a Free Peoples Army.
eventText: Roll a number of dice equal to the number of Nazgûl (up to a maximum of 5) and score one hit for every result of 5+.
combatPreCondition: Play if an Isengard Army unit is in the battle and the defending Army is in a Stronghold.
combatText: Add 1 to all dice on your Combat roll.
